title: Debug Galactus in circle but not participating

log.context: Debug Galactus in circle but not participating

Now the full picture is clear. Here is the complete diagnosis:

---

**Findings: Galactus in roster but no debate rounds**

**Confirmed affected sessions:** congress-0009, congress-0010, congress-0011 (and all future sessions will have this pattern).

**Root cause: Galactus is in the roster but was NOT selected by Ibrahim as a debater.**

The `roster` field in session JSON is a snapshot of all personas that existed at session creation time — it's a historical record, not the active debater list....(truncated)
